steps.t: The Wild Ruins lie to the south of Ost Galadh. Agorin has asked you to examine and record the records of the Silvan Elves of Ost Galadh in the Wild Ru…
Agorin is at Ost Galadh, north of the Wild Ruins. You should return to Agorin at and tell her what you discovered about the records of the Silvan Elve…
